'''Jorallen''' was a dark-haired [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]. A [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] with a dark past, he met [[Danni Quee]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Behind the scenes==
Jorallen was to appear in the [[Knightfall Trilogy|''Knightfall'' Trilogy]] before it was canceled.<ref name="knightfall">{{WebCite|url=http://theforce.net/books/unjoh/database/Appendices.html|text=The Essential Guide to the Yuuzhan Vong – Appendices|work=The Unofficial NJO Homepage|archivedate=20030208035613}}</ref>

*''[[The New Jedi Order: Knightfall II: Jedi Fire]]'' {{C|Cancelled}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Knightfall III: Jedi Blood]]'' {{C|Cancelled}}
